title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at CMC Vellore Capital India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at CMC Vellore Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? CMC Vellore Capital India in Aurangabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CMC Vellore Capital India:
CMC Vellore Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMC Vellore Capital India!
